aren't in use today so it took some time for everyone to realise what happened. A yorker from round the wicket, looks to flick it away, misses and it clips leg stump on the way. e past the keeper and through to the fence 14.1 6 Rabada to Rinku Singh, SIX, what a shot! Rinku Singh advances down the track, makes a bit of room for himself and smashes it over wide long-off for a maximum. . Just a flick of the wrists as he whips it over deep backward square leg for a flat maximum. A slower full-toss angling in, Hardik Pandya is early into the big hit actually but his bat swing and power helps him. His bottom hand comes off the handle but he still gets it over long-on for a maximum 17.2 W Nortje to Rinku Singh, out Caught by Stubbs!! Some respite for Nortje! He was smashed for 49 runs in his first two overs but now has something to smile about! A pitched up delivery on off, Rinku Singh clears his front leg and tries to hit it downtown but only manages to get it off the toe- end towards long-on. Stubbs moves across to his right and gets low to

leg, goes hard on the cross-batted smash and connects well enough 2.3 6 Rabada to Ishan Kishan, SIX, what form he's in! Good length from Rabada, it's around middle and Kishan effortlessly picks it up over midwicket 2 4 Marco Jansen to Ishan Kishan, FOUR, in the slot and punished! Pitched up from Jansen, right in the hitting arc and Kishan lofts it comfortably over mid-off. Already off to a flier! Might've been the slower one but got the length wrong 0.5 6 Ngidi to Ishan Kishan, SIX, too easy! Full delivery swinging down the leg-side, free swing for Kishan who dumps it over fine leg 0.2 6 Ngidi to Ishan Kishan, SIX, first one of the evening! Full and straight, hint of inswing and Kishan whacks it over mid-on to clear the ropes. Lovely swing of the bat!

rows.question: Describe the key moments in Suryakumar Yadav’s innings.
rows.expected_output: Suryakumar Yadav began with attacking strokes including a first-ball six, was dropped on 10.2 by Bosch while attempting a trademark scoop, scored 30 off 16 with two fours and two sixes, and was eventually caught by Linde off Kwena Maphaka after top-edging a slower ball.
rows.actual_output:
Suryakumar Yadav's innings featured several key moments:

1. He scored 30 runs off 16 balls, including 2 fours and 2 sixes, but struggled with timing throughout his innings.
2. He hit a six off Kwena Maphaka, showcasing his ability to capitalize on a good ball (12.2).
3. He had a lucky moment when he was dropped by a fielder while attempting a scoop shot (10.2).
